points.text: Bio-Rad Laboratories extended its portfolio of recombinant monoclonal anti-idiotypic antibodies with eight new specificities targeting approved biologics including romosuzumab, burosumab, and nirsevimab.
Bio-Rad launched a new anti-Fc mutation antibody range enabling selective detection of YTE-modified therapeutics (M252Y, S254T, T256E) to support pharmacokinetic bridging ELISAs.
argenx — VYVGART (efgartigimod) — Myasthenia Gravis and CIDP — Presented new data at AAN 2026 supporting broader use across indications; efgartigimod is an FcRn blocker monoclonal antibody.
Upstream Bio is advancing verekitug, a TSLP receptor antagonist, into Phase 3 trials for severe asthma and CRSwNP with dosing planned for Q1 2027.

The generalized myasthenia gravis (gMG) market across 7MM was valued at USD 5.9 billion in 2025 and is projected to grow at a 9.1% CAGR through 2036, driven by advanced targeted biologics including monoclonal antibodies.
Immunovant/Roivant Sciences is advancing IMVT-1402, a monoclonal antibody candidate, within the late-stage gMG treatment pipeline alongside other biologics like Gefurulimab and VYVGART.
Alexion AstraZeneca Rare Disease's Gefurulimab is identified as a promising late-stage monoclonal antibody candidate for generalized myasthenia gravis treatment.
Regeneron Pharmaceuticals is developing Pozelimab, a monoclonal antibody, in combination with Cemdisiran for generalized myasthenia gravis management.

Tiziana Life Sciences — Foralumab — Multiple System Atrophy — Phase 2a TILS-025 trial (NCT06868628) poster accepted for 7th World Parkinson Congress; study evaluates intranasal fully human anti-CD3 monoclonal antibody in up to 10 subjects.
Affibody AB is advancing radioligand therapies using Affibody molecules as a smaller, more stable alternative to full-size monoclonal antibodies (mAbs) for solid tumor targeting.

Daiichi Sankyo and Merck received US FDA priority review for ifinatamab deruxtecan, an antibody-drug conjugate targeting B7-H3, for extensive-stage small cell lung cancer (ES-SCLC) in patients progressing after platinum-based chemotherapy.
Kainova initiated patient dosing in the European expansion of its Phase I/II DOMISOL trial for DT-7012, a Treg-depleting anti-CCR8 monoclonal antibody, in patients with advanced solid tumours.

Fred Hutch Cancer Center researchers identified human-like monoclonal antibodies targeting Epstein-Barr virus (EBV) entry proteins gp350 and gp42, with one candidate completely preventing infection in humanized mouse models.
Renaissance Pharma Limited received FDA Fast Track designation and IND clearance for daretabart (hu1418K322A), an anti-GD2 monoclonal antibody, for high-risk neuroblastoma.
Phase 2 data for daretabart in high-risk neuroblastoma showed a 3-year event-free survival rate of 73.7% and overall survival of 86.0% when integrated with induction chemotherapy.

Bio-Rad Laboratories — Anti-idiotypic antibody portfolio expansion — Bioanalysis & Drug Monitoring — Added eight recombinant monoclonal antibodies specific to romosuzumab, burosumab, ixekizumab, elotuzumab, isatuximab, nirsevimab, tremelimumab, and dulaglutide.

Bio-Rad Laboratories — Anti-Fc mutation antibody range launch — Bioanalytical assay support — Introduced first range targeting YTE triple substitutions (M252Y, S254T, T256E) in human IgG1 Fc regions to measure free drug concentration.
argenx — VYVGART (efgartigimod) — Myasthenia Gravis and CIDP — New clinical data presented at AAN 2026 supporting expanded therapeutic application of the FcRn-blocking monoclonal antibody.

Upstream Bio — Verekitug — Severe Asthma and CRSwNP — Phase 3 development strategy initiated; Phase 2 VALIANT trial showed significant reduction in asthma exacerbations and improved lung function; Q1 2027 dosing start planned.
Immunovant/Roivant Sciences — IMVT-1402 — Generalized Myasthenia Gravis — Late-stage monoclonal antibody candidate advancing in clinical development to address unmet needs in refractory patients.
Alexion AstraZeneca Rare Disease — Gefurulimab — Generalized Myasthenia Gravis — Late-stage monoclonal antibody candidate included in the top 8 promising therapies reshaping gMG management.
Regeneron Pharmaceuticals — Pozelimab + Cemdisiran — Generalized Myasthenia Gravis — Late-stage combination therapy featuring a monoclonal antibody component advancing through clinical development.

Tiziana Life Sciences — Foralumab — Multiple System Atrophy — Phase 2a open-label trial enrolling 10 subjects (ages 30–85) to assess microglial activation via [F-18]PBR06 TSPO PET imaging and MDS-UMSARS scores over 6 months.

Affibody AB — ABY-271 — HER2-positive metastatic breast cancer — First-in-human clinical study evaluating a novel epitope-targeting radioligand therapy designed to overcome limitations of full-size monoclonal antibodies.

Daiichi Sankyo / Merck — Ifinatamab deruxtecan — Extensive-stage small cell lung cancer — US FDA granted priority review for BLA in patients with disease progression on or after platinum-based chemotherapy.
Kainova — DT-7012 — Advanced solid tumours — Patient dosing commenced in European expansion of Phase I/II DOMISOL trial for Treg-depleting anti-CCR8 antibody.

Fred Hutch Cancer Center — Anti-EBV monoclonal antibodies — Epstein-Barr virus infection and associated cancers — Identified 10 candidates (2 targeting gp350, 8 targeting gp42); one candidate achieved 100% infection prevention in humanized mouse models; findings published in Cell Reports Medicine.
Renaissance Pharma — Daretabart (hu1418K322A) — High-risk neuroblastoma — FDA granted Fast Track designation and cleared IND application; Phase 2/3 SHINE trial initiation approved in US.

Bio-Rad Laboratories — Expansion of bioanalytical assay tools — Monoclonal anti-idiotypic and anti-Fc mutation antibodies — Portfolio now exceeds 350 antibodies across 50+ specificities; 2025 revenue reported at $2.6 billion.
argenx — Commercial expansion of FcRn-blocking therapy — VYVGART (efgartigimod) monoclonal antibody — Presenting new data at AAN 2026 to support broader use in Myasthenia Gravis and CIDP.
Upstream Bio — Best-in-class TSLP antagonist development — Verekitug — $341.5M cash position to fund operations through 2027; Phase 3 trials targeting quarterly 400 mg dosing regimen.

Immunovant/Roivant Sciences — Monoclonal antibody commercialization for autoimmune disorders — IMVT-1402 — Late-stage development for generalized myasthenia gravis targeting autoantibody-mediated pathology.
Alexion AstraZeneca Rare Disease — Expansion of rare disease biologic portfolio — Gefurulimab — Late-stage monoclonal antibody candidate for generalized myasthenia gravis.
Regeneron Pharmaceuticals — Advanced combination biologic therapies — Pozelimab (monoclonal antibody) + Cemdisiran — Late-stage pipeline for generalized myasthenia gravis.

Tiziana Life Sciences — Neurodegenerative disease therapy via intranasal delivery — Foralumab (fully human anti-CD3 monoclonal antibody) — Phase 2a TILS-025 trial ongoing in Multiple System Atrophy; prior data showed neuroinflammation reduction in MS and Alzheimer's.

Affibody AB — Next-generation radioligand therapy development — ABY-271 and pipeline for GEAC, NSCLC, TNBC, PDAC — Leveraging Affibody molecules as a versatile alternative to monoclonal antibodies for improved tumor penetration and stability.
Daiichi Sankyo — Regulatory advancement of B7-H3 targeted ADC — Ifinatamab deruxtecan — Priority review granted by US FDA for ES-SCLC indication.
Kainova — Clinical expansion of Treg-depleting antibody program — DT-7012 (anti-CCR8 mAb) — Phase I/II trial dosing initiated in Europe for advanced solid tumours.

Fred Hutch Cancer Center — Monoclonal antibody discovery for EBV — Anti-gp350 and anti-gp42 mAbs — Validated novel discovery platform using human antibody-engineered mice; early-stage preclinical validation completed.

Renaissance Pharma Limited — Commercialization of anti-GD2 monoclonal antibody — Daretabart (hu1418K322A) — Exclusive license from St. Jude Children's Research Hospital; first commercial-scale GMP batch manufactured for SHINE trial.

Nirsevimab (Beyfortus) — Mechanism: Monoclonal antibody targeting RSV F protein — Application: Bioanalytical assay standard — Status: Included in Bio-Rad's new anti-idiotypic antibody range for PK and ADA assay development.

Romosuzumab (Evenity) — Mechanism: Monoclonal antibody targeting sclerostin — Application: Bioanalytical assay standard — Status: Included in Bio-Rad's new anti-idiotypic antibody range for PK and ADA assay development.

VYVGART (efgartigimod) — Mechanism: FcRn blockade to reduce pathogenic IgG — Phase: Commercial/Post-marketing expansion — Population: Patients with Myasthenia Gravis and CIDP — Endpoints: New data presented at AAN 2026 supporting broader clinical utility of the monoclonal antibody.

Verekitug — Mechanism: TSLP receptor antagonist — Phase: 3 (planned) — Population: Severe asthma and CRSwNP — Comparator: Not specified in source — Endpoints: Best-in-class efficacy with quarterly 400 mg dosing; Phase 2 VALIANT demonstrated significant exacerbation reduction.

IMVT-1402 — Mechanism: Monoclonal antibody targeting pathogenic autoantibodies — Phase: Late-stage — Population: Generalized Myasthenia Gravis patients — Status: Advancing in clinical development to improve rapid disease control.
Gefurulimab — Mechanism: Monoclonal antibody — Phase: Late-stage — Population: Generalized Myasthenia Gravis — Status: Included among 8 promising late-stage candidates signaling a new treatment era.

Pozelimab — Mechanism: Monoclonal antibody (combined with Cemdisiran) — Phase: Late-stage — Population: Generalized Myasthenia Gravis — Status: Advancing through clinical development as part of a combination regimen.

Foralumab — Mechanism: Fully human anti-CD3 monoclonal antibody targeting microglial activation — Phase: 2a (TILS-025) — Population: Multiple System Atrophy (30–85 years) — Comparator: None (open-label) — Endpoints: [F-18]PBR06 TSPO PET imaging changes, MDS-UMSARS scores, regional brain atrophy, autonomic function.

ABY-271 — Mechanism: Radioligand therapy using Affibody molecule scaffold (smaller than monoclonal antibodies) targeting HER2 — Phase: First-in-human — Population: HER2-positive metastatic breast cancer — Differentiation: Targets novel epitope compared to concurrent monoclonal antibody therapies.
DT-7012 — Mechanism: Treg-depleting anti-CCR8 monoclonal antibody — Phase: I/II — Population: Advanced solid tumours — Comparator: Not specified — Status: European expansion dosing initiated.

Ifinatamab deruxtecan — Mechanism: B7-H3 targeted antibody-drug conjugate — Phase: BLA review — Population: ES-SCLC post-platinum progression — Comparator: Not applicable — Status: Priority review granted by US FDA.

Anti-EBV monoclonal antibodies — Mechanism: Neutralization of viral entry via gp350 (attachment) and gp42 (fusion) blockade — Phase: Preclinical — Population: Humanized mice with human immune systems — Comparator: None stated — Results: One antibody candidate completely prevented EBV infection in vivo.

Daretabart — Mechanism: Anti-GD2 monoclonal antibody with novel structural modifications for improved tolerability — Phase: 2/3 (SHINE) — Population: Children <19 with newly diagnosed or relapsed/refractory high-risk neuroblastoma — Endpoints: 3-year EFS 73.7% and OS 86.0% in Phase 2; partial response rate 66.7% after 2 cycles.

Bio-Rad Laboratories — Product line expansion — Monoclonal antibody reagents — Launched first anti-Fc mutation range and first anti-biotherapeutic antibody against a GLP-1 receptor agonist (dulaglutide) to support therapeutic drug monitoring.

Renaissance Pharma Limited — Exclusive license agreement — Daretabart (hu1418K322A) — Licensed from St. Jude Children's Research Hospital for development and commercialization in high-risk neuroblastoma.
